press.title: This small chain is bucking price trends with fish tacos for about $1
press.author: Andie Corban
press.quote: El Pueblo Mexican Food, a family-owned chain in northern San Diego County, has kept the price of its signature fish tacos close to a dollar for more than a decade.

press.title: El Pueblo now serving up authentic Mexican in Pacific Highlands Ranch
press.quote: Fish taco specialists El Pueblo open a fourth restaurant at The Village at Pacific Highlands Ranch — fresh, family-owned Mexican food now serving Carmel Valley.

press.title: Fish Tacos For $1.19? A Veteran Journalist Launches A Tasty Investigation
press.author: Jill Replogle
press.quote: El Pueblo Mexican Food, a family-owned chain in northern San Diego County, has kept its fish tacos at a remarkably low price despite rising food costs.

press.title: El Pueblo to open in La Jolla's former Jack in the Box space
press.author: Elisabeth Frausto
press.quote: El Pueblo will bring good food with great prices and customer service to La Jolla — premium ingredients and traditional recipes in a sit-down, fast-casual setting.

press.title: El Pueblo Mexican Restaurant To Open At Long-Vacant Former Jack In The Box Site In La Jolla
press.quote: A locally-grown Mexican restaurant group known for its affordable fare and low-cost fish tacos expands to a fifth San Diego location.

press.title: El Pueblo Mexican Food Opening Fourth Restaurant
press.quote: The family-owned establishment known for tacos and margaritas expands to Carmel Valley at The Village at Pacific Highlands Ranch.
